Subject: A black haired boy
Event: The black haired boy accidentally kicked a pile of garbage on the street corner, releasing a foul stench that made him wrinkle his nose in disgust.
story_prompts: The same A black haired boy walks cautiously along a cracked sidewalk lined with peeling paint and scattered trash under dull gray skies, eyes scanning uneasily.
The same A black haired boy steps near a grimy street corner where a growing pile of garbage teeters messily, brown paper and plastic bags bulging visibly.
The same A black haired boy accidentally kicks the pile of garbage, causing loose cans and rotting food to spill outward, face wrinkling sharply in disgust.
The same A black haired boy recoils back with clenched eyes as a noxious stench swirls around him, blurred city buildings under heavy smog looming behind.
